scripts.test: npm run check:mobile-release-config && npm run check:device-health-protection && npm run check:direct-watch-parser-coverage && npm run check:mobile-workout-performance && npm run check:import-template && npm run check:constructor-core && npm run check:constructor-matrix-evidence-dependencies && npm run check:constructor-matrix-data-dependencies && npm run check:constructor-matrix-threshold-candidates && npm run check:constructor-matrix-review-package && npm run check:constructor-matrix-review-decision-ledger && npm run check:constructor-matrix-source-expansion-backlog && npm run check:constructor-matrix-source-candidates && npm run check:constructor-matrix-source-lookup-intake && npm run check:constructor-matrix-evidence-claims && npm run check:constructor-matrix-evidence-claim-review-intake && npm run check:constructor-matrix-ui-gates && npm run check:constructor-matrix-review-export && npm run check:constructor-matrix-production-rollout
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @training-platform/shared && npm run build --workspace @training-platform/api && npm run build --workspace @training-platform/web && npm run build --workspace @training-platform/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/mobile
